subcodes.first_line: Your letter was received, and from its contents it became evident that news of the journey to Egypt had spread throughout those regions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه شما رسید و از مضمون چنین مفهوم گردید که خبر سفر مصر در آندیار اشتهار
